title: hex2dec

messages.description: hexadecimal value(s) to convert (outputs the result)
convert and output, or output the last converted value(s)
hexadecimal value to convert when receiving a bang

body: [hex2dec] converts hexadecimal values to decimal ones. It takes symbols whose format allows lower and upper case letters and can also include "0x" or "0X" prefixes (necessary in the case of lists and arguments to avoid confusion with floats, which are ignored). List and symbol selectors aren't necessary.
